updated_conclusion: The 0x140679720 sibling builder's stack_arg7 path is a provider descriptor materialization path, not an opaque callback. The builder loads the object at [stack_arg7+0x38], dispatches vtable slot 0 with RDX=record+0x88, and stores the returned embedded provider pointer into record+0xC0.
evidence_source: Fresh headless no-analysis run rs2quick67 with GhidraReadQwordsPy.py over descriptor/vtable candidates 0x140B69FC0, 0x140B859D8, 0x140B69F60, and 0x140B61B90.
Fresh headless no-analysis run rs2quick68 with GhidraDumpWindowsPy.py over descriptor thunks 0x1401722E0, 0x1403EE390, and 0x1400E0F90.

dispatch_sequence: 0x1406797D2 loads RAX from [RCX], treating [RCX] as a vtable/descriptor pointer.
0x1406797DC calls qword ptr [RAX], dispatching descriptor slot 0.
0x1406797DE stores the returned pointer into record +0xC0.
sibling_builder_provider_dispatch.corrected_role: Provider clone/materializer whose output lives inline at record+0x88 and is referenced from record+0xC0.

slot_summary.evidence: LEA RAX,[0x140B69FC0]; MOV [RDX],RAX; MOV RAX,[RCX+0x8]; MOV [RDX+0x8],RAX; MOV RAX,RDX; RET.

slot_summary.role: Unwrap/forward helper: MOV RDX,[RDX]; MOV RCX,[RCX+0x8]; JMP 0x14014C0F0.

materialized_fields.output_plus_0x08: payload pointer copied from source provider +0x8

slot_summary.evidence: LEA RAX,[0x140B859D8]; MOV [RDX],RAX; MOV RAX,[RCX+0x8]; MOV [RDX+0x8],RAX; MOV RAX,RDX; RET.

materialized_fields.output_plus_0x08: payload pointer copied from source provider +0x8

descriptor_tables.seen_from_callsite: 0x1400CCDB0 setup context before vt-varc fixed-kind producer

slot_summary.role: Clone/materialize a related provider with descriptor 0x140B69F60.
slot_summary.evidence: LEA RAX,[0x140B69F60]; MOV [RDX],RAX; MOV RAX,[RCX+0x8]; MOV [RDX+0x8],RAX; MOV RAX,RDX; RET.

descriptor_tables.relationship: Adjacent family to 0x140B69FC0 and 0x140B69F90; likely participates in the same vt-varc/source-provider setup but is not yet proven as the exact slot-0 provider consumed by 0x140679720.

slot_summary.evidence: LEA RAX,[0x140B61B90]; MOV [RDX],RAX; MOV RAX,[RCX+0x8]; MOV [RDX+0x8],RAX; MOV RAX,RDX; RET.

descriptor_tables.relationship: This descriptor is adjacent to the directlogin 0x140679500 caller and has the same clone/materialize shape as the sibling-provider descriptors.

callsite_backlinks.back_pointer_field: RBP+0x90 contains &descriptor_object and is read by the builder through stack_arg7+0x38.
RBP+0x38 contains &descriptor_object and is read by the builder through stack_arg7+0x38.
Still stack-local; descriptor pointer not fully named in this pass.

relationship_to_previous_milestones.login-settings-builder-direct-call-calle: Resolves the provider-descriptor next target for two of the four concrete 0x140679720 callers and classifies the former callback edge.
relationship_to_previous_milestones.login-settings-sibling-record-builder-ca: Refines 'callback/provider object' into a concrete vtable slot-0 clone/materializer with output lifetime in the record itself.
relationship_to_previous_milestones.login-settings-record-builder-factory-mo: Preserves the shared factory path while separating sibling-only provider materialization from the variable-kind builder.

bounded_inference.statement: The 0x140679720 sibling builder embeds an owned provider clone at record+0x88 and records its pointer at +0xC0. Descriptor families differ by caller domain (player/vt-varc/console/directlogin-adjacent), but the first-slot materializer shape is consistent: stamp descriptor pointer, copy payload +0x8, return output.

next_targets: Resolve the 0x1403D8E7A stack-local descriptor pointer used by the Config fixed-kind producer.
Use pe-direct-calls against descriptor slot helpers such as 0x1401722E0 and 0x1403EE390 to find additional provider materialization owners.
Trace the type/static descriptor getters 0x140C51CE0, 0x140C53F10, and 0x140C4D4A0 to recover human-readable provider type names.
